creator: kubito@gmail.com
text:
Raphael Kubo da Costa <kubito@gmail.com> writes:

> Hi,
>
> I still experience this issue with gdb 7.2_4 and binutils 2.21.
>
> Even using "gdb72 `which gdb72`" gives me
>
>   Reading symbols from /usr/local/bin/gdb72...I'm sorry, Dave, I can't
>   do that.  Symbol format `elf64-x86-64-freebsd' unknown.
>
> gdb is built with debug symbols.
>
> Is there anything I can do to help fix this?

Hello? :)
